acceptance_criteria: Approved-field paste proof on the live Orders document route on staging.

assertions.label: processCellFromClipboard accepts valid values on approved fields
assertions.expected: processCellFromClipboard normalizes and validates clipboard values for quantity, cogsPerUnit, marginPercent, unitPrice, and isSample.
assertions.observed: Unit test at OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid.test.tsx (line 462) confirms invalid values are rejected with structured messages; valid values are accepted and recalculated

assertions.label: processDataFromClipboard validates paste rectangle width against column policies
assertions.expected: processDataFromClipboard returns null with a blocked message when paste width spills into locked columns.
assertions.observed: Unit test at OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid.test.tsx (line 490) confirms paste overflow rejection with structured message

assertions.label: Live Orders document route is not reachable for paste proof session
assertions.expected: A fresh reachable Orders document route with Playwright clipboard API properly granting permissions.
assertions.observed: Proof budget exhausted (0 fresh deployed reruns remaining). Prior attempts showed validPasteMethod: none due to empty browser clipboard readback.

blocker_detail.reason: Proof budget is exhausted and prior live paste attempts failed due to Playwright clipboard API limitations (empty clipboard readback). The handoff explicitly states: park until a fresh reachable build exists and use isolated paste-only mode.
blocker_detail.code_readiness: processCellFromClipboard, processDataFromClipboard, and paste-rectangle overflow rejection are all implemented and unit-tested. The code paths handle both valid and invalid clipboard data correctly.
blocker_detail.unblock_condition: A fresh reachable Orders document route with Playwright clipboard API properly granting permissions, followed by one isolated paste probe using --mode=paste-only.
blocker_detail.prior_attempts: Browser clipboard readback was empty in prior probes. The harness was updated to attempt both host clipboard and in-browser clipboard writes, but the issue persisted.

summary.prior_clipboard_issue: validPasteMethod: none due to empty browser clipboard readback
